descriptionEn: Our soccer team won the regional championship with an undefeated season
descriptionXh: Iqela lesoccer lethu lithule uchampionship regional ngexesha elingadlali
descriptionAf: Ons sokker span het die streek kampioenskap gewen met 'n onoorwonne seisoen
descriptionTn: Setlhopha sa soccer sa rona se folegetse regional championship ka sefelo se se sa tlhokegang

descriptionEn: Netball team secured first place in the provincial tournament
descriptionXh: Iqela lenetball lithule indawo yesi-1 kwi-provincial tournament
descriptionAf: Netbal span het eerste plek verseker in die provinsiale toernooi
descriptionTn: Setlhopha sa netball se folegetse sephara pele mo provincial tournament

descriptionEn: Rugby team emerged victorious in the regional rugby tournament
descriptionXh: Iqela lerugby lithule kwi-regional rugby tournament
descriptionAf: Rugby span het oorwinning behaal in die streek rugby toernooi
descriptionTn: Setlhopha sa rugby se folegetse mo regional rugby tournament

descriptionEn: School choir won gold medal at the provincial eisteddfod
descriptionXh: Iqela lechoir lesikolo lithule igolide kwi-provincial eisteddfod
descriptionAf: Skool koor het goue medalje gewen by die provinsiale eisteddfod
descriptionTn: Setlhopha sa choir sa sekolo se folegetse gold medal mo provincial eisteddfod

descriptionEn: Debate team won the regional debate championship
descriptionXh: Iqela ledebate lithule uchampionship regional
descriptionAf: Debat span het die streek debat kampioenskap gewen
descriptionTn: Setlhopha sa debate se folegetse regional debate championship

descriptionEn: Achieved 75% distinction rate in matric examinations
descriptionXh: Kwafuneka i-75% distinction rate kwi-matric examinations
descriptionAf: Behaal 75% onderskeidingskoers in matriek eksamens
descriptionTn: E folegetse 75% distinction rate mo matric examinations

descriptionEn: Students won medals at the national mathematics olympiad
descriptionXh: Abafundi bathule imedali kwi-national mathematics olympiad
descriptionAf: Studente het medaljes gewen by die nasionale wiskunde olimpiade
descriptionTn: Baithuti ba folegetse medals mo national mathematics olympiad

descriptionEn: Innovative science projects won regional science fair
descriptionXh: Iiprojekthi zesayensi ezintsha zathule i-regional science fair
descriptionAf: Innovatiewe wetenskap projekte het streek wetenskap skou gewen
descriptionTn: Diproje tsa saense tse di tshosang di folegetse regional science fair

descriptionEn: Accounting students achieved top marks in national assessment
descriptionXh: Abafundi beaccounting bathule amaphuzu aphezulu kwi-national assessment
descriptionAf: Rekeningkunde studente het top punte behaal in nasionale assessering
descriptionTn: Baithuti ba accounting ba folegetse dipalo tse di godimo mo national assessment

descriptionEn: Top student recognized for academic and leadership excellence
descriptionXh: Umfundi ophambili wamkelwe ngobuchule bemfundo nobunkokheli
descriptionAf: Top student erken vir akademiese en leierskap uitnemendheid
descriptionTn: Motho o phahametseng a amogediwang ka bokgoni jwa thuto le boeteledipele

descriptionEn: Student athlete excelled in multiple sports disciplines
descriptionXh: Umfundi we-athletics wathule kwi-multiple sports disciplines
descriptionAf: Student atleet het uitgeblink in verskeie sport dissiplines
descriptionTn: Motho wa atlete o folegetse mo multiple sports disciplines

descriptionEn: Student dedicated significant time to community service projects
descriptionXh: Umfundi wabelwe ixesha elikhulu kwiiprojekthi zeservisi yoluntu
descriptionAf: Student het beduidende tyd gewy aan gemeenskapsdiens projekte
descriptionTn: Motho o abileng nako e kgetlehileng mo diprojektseng tsa tirelo ya setshaba
